title: rpm: require slirp4netns for podman-tests package
body:
We have some tests that need it so we should test with it.

comments.body: @lsm5 PTAL not sure we this did not show up elsewhere but I found this via https://pagure.io/fedora-qa/os-autoinst-distri-fedora/issue/373

That didn't fail in recent times in TMT tests on bodhi because of https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman/blob/rawhide/f/test/tmt/system.fmf#_7 . I can remove it from there now that it's in the spec.

Thanks a lot.

> That didn't fail in recent times in TMT tests on bodhi because of https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman/blob/rawhide/f/test/tmt/system.fmf#_7 . I can remove it from there now that it's in the spec.
> 
> Thanks a lot.

ack, you can drop attr and bats there as well as it is also a -tests dependency already. Not sure why psmisc is there? Is that uses by system tests as well?

> ack, you can drop attr and bats there as well as it is also a -tests dependency already. 

ack

> Not sure why psmisc is there? Is that uses by system tests as well?

IIRC, the remote tests were not exiting after completion and then timing out, so I ran a killall podman for remote tests towards the end.
